name: asil.search_code
description: Hybrid vector + graph search across indexed repos. Returns ranked code symbols with file paths and qualified names.

name: asil.get_callers
description: Reverse call-graph lookup: who calls this function?

name: asil.get_dependencies
description: Forward call-graph lookup: what does this function depend on?

name: asil.who_owns
description: Code ownership from git blame + commit history.

name: asil.commit_history
description: Time-ordered commits touching a file or symbol, with confidence-scored intent inference.

name: asil.recall
description: Vector search over episodic memory: prior conclusions reused across sessions.

name: asil.find_causes
description: THE MOAT. Composite causal scoring across temporal proximity, lagged correlation, and explicit reference. Returns ranked causes with confidence + derivation per strategy.

name: asil.ask
description: End-to-end question answering: retrieves context, drafts an answer, verifies each claim against the graph, returns answer + confidence + unsupported-claim count.

name: asil.replay_incident
description: Reconstruct an incident timeline + service cascade + state diff from runtime events.

name: asil.drift_check
description: Compare current dependency graph against the saved baseline. Returns new edges and boundary violations.
